case_title: SHAMSAN HADWAN VS. LUXOR TAXI COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-17-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST SHAMSAN HADWAN, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-17-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-01-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-17-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Continued To Nov-20-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. Court ordered sanction order issued today to include language that the sanctions previously issued to Shamsan Hadwan on JUL-18-2012 in the amount of $350.00 for failure to appear at the JUL-17-2012 hearing are also to be paid with a total amount due of $700.00. The OSC is reset to NOV-20-2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
